response.overview: The film is intended for young children and tells about the famous character of Azerbaijani folklore, Cırtdan, and his new, amusing adventures in the modern era. It blends fantastic elements from folk tales with contemporary motifs, creating a harmonious mix of tradition and modernity.  In the story, enormous modern technology, a product of human ingenuity, is always ready to help humanity. No matter how much the legendary Simurgh bird and the magic carpet fly after the magical ball, they cannot catch it. Then a powerful and kind rocket comes to the rescue, catches the magical ball, and returns it to little Cırtdan.
response.title: Cırtdanın yeni sərgüzəşti
